channel.title: The Rest Day with Jack Haig
channel.description:
The Rest Day with Jack Haig takes cycling fans inside the pro peloton. Want to know what riders actually talk about? This is your podcast.
Escape Collective is member-funded. If you like this podcast please consider supporting us by becoming a member: https://escapecollective.com/member/

image.title: The Rest Day with Jack Haig

channel.itunes:author: Escape Collective
channel.itunes:summary:
The Rest Day with Jack Haig takes cycling fans inside the pro peloton. Want to know what riders actually talk about? This is your podcast.
Escape Collective is member-funded. If you like this podcast please consider supporting us by becoming a member: https://escapecollective.com/member/
channel.itunes:subtitle: The Rest Day with Jack Haig takes cycling fans inside the pro peloton.
channel.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Kicking off a new season with Pavel Sivakov
item.itunes:title: Kicking off a new season with Pavel Sivakov
item.description: The Rest Day with Jack Haig is back with its first episode of 2025, featuring a chat with Pavel Sivakov of UAE Team Emirates. Jack and Pavel tackle a wide range of topic, from riding with Tadej Pogačar to fighting for a GC top 10 in the Vuelta a España, from the dynamics of national teams vs. trade teams to salary caps.
item.content:encoded: The Rest Day with Jack Haig is back with its first episode of 2025, featuring a chat with Pavel Sivakov of UAE Team Emirates. Jack and Pavel tackle a wide range of topic, from riding with Tadej Pogačar to fighting for a GC top 10 in the Vuelta a España, from the dynamics of national teams vs. trade teams to salary caps.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: The Rest Day with Jack Haig is back with its first episode of 2025, featuring a chat with Pavel Sivakov of UAE Team Emirates. Jack and Pavel tackle a wide range of topic, from riding with Tadej Pogačar to fighting for a GC top 10 in the Vuelta a España, from the dynamics of national teams vs. trade teams to salary caps.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Offseason talk with Harry Sweeny
item.itunes:title: Offseason talk with Harry Sweeny
item.description: With the offseason in full swing, Harry Sweeny returns to the Rest Day. Harry and Jack discuss the end of the racing season, last-minute scheduling changes, Harry's first year with EF (and getting his first chance to target GC in Luxembourg), taking some time to recover, and more ...
item.content:encoded: With the offseason in full swing, Harry Sweeny returns to the Rest Day. Harry and Jack discuss the end of the racing season, last-minute scheduling changes, Harry's first year with EF (and getting his first chance to target GC in Luxembourg), taking some time to recover, and more ...
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: With the offseason in full swing, Harry Sweeny returns to the Rest Day. Harry and Jack discuss the end of the racing season, last-minute scheduling changes, Harry's first year with EF (and getting his first chance to target GC in Luxembourg), taking some time to recover, and more ...
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Alex Dowsett: Life After Pro Cycling
item.itunes:title: Alex Dowsett: Life After Pro Cycling
item.description: In this episode of The Rest Day, Jack sits down with Alex Dowsett to discuss his 12 years as a professional cyclist, how the sport has evolved and what life is like after retirement. Dowsett, a time trial specialist, offers unique insights into the demands of the sport, the impact of technology and aerodynamics, and the mental challenges faced by athletes. He also shares his experiences of fatherhood while competing, and the adjustments he made to his training and lifestyle after retiring.
item.content:encoded: In this episode of The Rest Day, Jack sits down with Alex Dowsett to discuss his 12 years as a professional cyclist, how the sport has evolved and what life is like after retirement. Dowsett, a time trial specialist, offers unique insights into the demands of the sport, the impact of technology and aerodynamics, and the mental challenges faced by athletes. He also shares his experiences of fatherhood while competing, and the adjustments he made to his training and lifestyle after retiring.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In this episode of The Rest Day, Jack sits down with Alex Dowsett to discuss his 12 years as a professional cyclist, how the sport has evolved and what life is like after retirement. Dowsett, a time trial specialist, offers unique insights into the demands of the sport, the impact of technology and aerodynamics, and the mental challenges faced by athletes. He also shares his experiences of fatherhood while competing, and the adjustments he made to his training and lifestyle after retiring.

item.title: Chatting YouTube, sponsorship, and more with Harry Sweeny
item.itunes:title: Chatting YouTube, sponsorship, and more with Harry Sweeny
item.description: Jack Haig catches up with Australian up-and-comer Harry Sweeny, and the two discuss the Vuelta, EF Education-EasyPost, YouTube, the cycling sponsorship model, and more ...
item.content:encoded: Jack Haig catches up with Australian up-and-comer Harry Sweeny, and the two discuss the Vuelta, EF Education-EasyPost, YouTube, the cycling sponsorship model, and more ...
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Jack Haig catches up with Australian up-and-comer Harry Sweeny, and the two discuss the Vuelta, EF Education-EasyPost, YouTube, the cycling sponsorship model, and more ...
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: One week left at the Vuelta
item.itunes:title: One week left at the Vuelta
item.description: Jack Haig checks in from the second rest day at the Vuelta a España after another challenging week of racing. The peloton has left the heat behind but the gradients aren't letting up as the season's final Grand Tour rolls towards its conclusion.
item.content:encoded: Jack Haig checks in from the second rest day at the Vuelta a España after another challenging week of racing. The peloton has left the heat behind but the gradients aren't letting up as the season's final Grand Tour rolls towards its conclusion.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Jack Haig checks in from the second rest day at the Vuelta a España after another challenging week of racing. The peloton has left the heat behind but the gradients aren't letting up as the season's final Grand Tour rolls towards its conclusion.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Vuelta insights after a big transfer
item.itunes:title: Vuelta insights after a big transfer
item.description: Jack Haig checks in from the first rest day of the Vuelta a España, discussing the racing, the heat, a big transfer, and more.
item.content:encoded: Jack Haig checks in from the first rest day of the Vuelta a España, discussing the racing, the heat, a big transfer, and more.

item.title: Preparing for a Grand Tour with Torstein Træen
item.itunes:title: Preparing for a Grand Tour with Torstein Træen
item.description: Jack Haig is joined by teammate Torstein Træen, and they discuss Torstein's busy build-up to the Vuelta a España and plenty more.
item.content:encoded: Jack Haig is joined by teammate Torstein Træen, and they discuss Torstein's busy build-up to the Vuelta a España and plenty more.

item.title: A Tour debrief and listener questions
item.itunes:title: A Tour debrief and listener questions
item.description: In the latest episode of the podcast, Jack Haig offers some final thoughts on the 2024 Tour de France and then tackles some listener questions.
item.content:encoded: In the latest episode of the podcast, Jack Haig offers some final thoughts on the 2024 Tour de France and then tackles some listener questions.
item.author: Escape Collective

item.title: Keeping tired bodies going at Tour de France
item.itunes:title: Keeping tired bodies going at Tour de France
item.description: In this episode, Jack catches up with his massage therapist for a look at one of the unseen sides of racing and working at the Tour de France.
item.content:encoded: In this episode, Jack catches up with his massage therapist for a look at one of the unseen sides of racing and working at the Tour de France.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective

item.title: A Rest Day on the rest day with Wout Poels
item.itunes:title: A Rest Day on the rest day with Wout Poels
item.description: The Tour de France peloton made it to the first rest day and Jack caught up with roommate Wout Poels to discuss the week that's come and gone.
item.content:encoded: The Tour de France peloton made it to the first rest day and Jack caught up with roommate Wout Poels to discuss the week that's come and gone.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective

item.title: Getting ready for the Tour de France
item.itunes:title: Getting ready for the Tour de France
item.description: Welcome back to The Rest Day with Jack Haig. This is another solo episode, a life update and discussion of Tour recon, as Jack prepares to take on the 2024 Tour de France.
item.content:encoded: Welcome back to The Rest Day with Jack Haig. This is another solo episode, a life update and discussion of Tour recon, as Jack prepares to take on the 2024 Tour de France.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Welcome back to The Rest Day with Jack Haig. This is another solo episode, a life update and discussion of Tour recon, as Jack prepares to take on the 2024 Tour de France.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: On Tenerife with Ineos' Carlos Rodríguez
item.itunes:title: On Tenerife with Ineos' Carlos Rodríguez
item.description: In this episode, Jack catches up with Ineos' young climber Carlos Rodríguez from the Parador Hotel on Tenerife, where both are located for an altitude training camp before the Tour de France. The two discuss the hardest days they've had on camp, life at altitude, how Rodriguez prepared (and what he overcame) for his Tour de France stage win last year, his university degrees, and more.
item.content:encoded: In this episode, Jack catches up with Ineos' young climber Carlos Rodríguez from the Parador Hotel on Tenerife, where both are located for an altitude training camp before the Tour de France. The two discuss the hardest days they've had on camp, life at altitude, how Rodriguez prepared (and what he overcame) for his Tour de France stage win last year, his university degrees, and more.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, Jack catches up with Ineos' young climber Carlos Rodríguez from the Parador Hotel on Tenerife, where both are located for an altitude training camp before the Tour de France. The two discuss the hardest days they've had on camp, life at altitude, how Rodriguez prepared (and what he overcame) for his Tour de France stage win last year, his university degrees, and more.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Inside a Tenerife altitude camp
item.itunes:title: Inside a Tenerife altitude camp
item.description: In this episode, Jack chats with teammate Matevž Govekar from a pre-Dauphiné Tenerife training camp about altitude, why teams pick various high-altitude locations, making one's way into the pro peloton, and lots more.
item.content:encoded: In this episode, Jack chats with teammate Matevž Govekar from a pre-Dauphiné Tenerife training camp about altitude, why teams pick various high-altitude locations, making one's way into the pro peloton, and lots more.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, Jack chats with teammate Matevž Govekar from a pre-Dauphiné Tenerife training camp about altitude, why teams pick various high-altitude locations, making one's way into the pro peloton, and lots more.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Who drives the bus?
item.itunes:title: Who drives the bus?
item.description: There are so many people who make pro cycling tick along who never get TV time, don't see the limelight, but are nonetheless indispensable. In this episode, Jack sits down with Elias, one of the bus drivers for Bahrain-Victorious to discuss his role in keeping pro cycling moving.
item.content:encoded: There are so many people who make pro cycling tick along who never get TV time, don't see the limelight, but are nonetheless indispensable. In this episode, Jack sits down with Elias, one of the bus drivers for Bahrain-Victorious to discuss his role in keeping pro cycling moving.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: There are so many people who make pro cycling tick along who never get TV time, don't see the limelight, but are nonetheless indispensable. In this episode, Jack sits down with Elias, one of the bus drivers for Bahrain-Victorious to discuss his role in keeping pro cycling moving.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Introspection of the dropped
item.itunes:title: Introspection of the dropped
item.description: In this episode, Jack takes some time to reflect on a difficult few weeks. Pro cycling has ups and downs, and the entry to spring was a down. How does one get through such a period?
item.content:encoded: In this episode, Jack takes some time to reflect on a difficult few weeks. Pro cycling has ups and downs, and the entry to spring was a down. How does one get through such a period?
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, Jack takes some time to reflect on a difficult few weeks. Pro cycling has ups and downs, and the entry to spring was a down. How does one get through such a period?
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Pavel Sivakov and riding for Pogacar
item.itunes:title: Pavel Sivakov and riding for Pogacar
item.description: Welcome to the second episode of The Rest Day with Jack Haig. In this week's show, Jack catches up with Pavel Sivakov to talk Catalunya and the UAE Tour. They talk changing teams (from Ineos to UAE), what it's like riding for Pogacar, and more.
item.content:encoded: Welcome to the second episode of The Rest Day with Jack Haig. In this week's show, Jack catches up with Pavel Sivakov to talk Catalunya and the UAE Tour. They talk changing teams (from Ineos to UAE), what it's like riding for Pogacar, and more.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Welcome to the second episode of The Rest Day with Jack Haig. In this week's show, Jack catches up with Pavel Sivakov to talk Catalunya and the UAE Tour. They talk changing teams (from Ineos to UAE), what it's like riding for Pogacar, and more.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Inside Paris-Nice and Tirreno-Adriatico
item.itunes:title: Inside Paris-Nice and Tirreno-Adriatico
item.description: Welcome to the first episode of The Rest Day with Jack Haig! This new podcast is hosted by Bahrain-Victorious' Jack Haig and will take you behind the curtain of pro cycling. The first episode is a chat between Jack and his roommate, Wout Poels, discussing Paris-Nice and Tirreno-Adriatico from the inside.
item.content:encoded: Welcome to the first episode of The Rest Day with Jack Haig! This new podcast is hosted by Bahrain-Victorious' Jack Haig and will take you behind the curtain of pro cycling. The first episode is a chat between Jack and his roommate, Wout Poels, discussing Paris-Nice and Tirreno-Adriatico from the inside.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Welcome to the first episode of The Rest Day with Jack Haig! This new podcast is hosted by Bahrain-Victorious' Jack Haig and will take you behind the curtain of pro cycling. The first episode is a chat between Jack and his roommate, Wout Poels, discussing Paris-Nice and Tirreno-Adriatico from the inside.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour

item.title: Introducing The Rest Day with Jack Haig
item.itunes:title: Introducing The Rest Day with Jack Haig
item.description: Welcome to The Rest Day with Jack Haig, a new podcast hosted by Jack on the Escape Collective podcast network. Every other week, Jack will bring listeners inside the pro peloton, pulling back the curtain on life as a pro.
item.content:encoded: Welcome to The Rest Day with Jack Haig, a new podcast hosted by Jack on the Escape Collective podcast network. Every other week, Jack will bring listeners inside the pro peloton, pulling back the curtain on life as a pro.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Welcome to The Rest Day with Jack Haig, a new podcast hosted by Jack on the Escape Collective podcast network. Every other week, Jack will bring listeners inside the pro peloton, pulling back the curtain on life as a pro.
item.itunes:keywords: cycling, pro cycling,tour de france,giro d'italia,paris-roubaix,cycling podcast,bike racing,professional bike racing,worldtour
